title: Ochthebius (Ochthebius) wurayah Jach & Delgado 2010
author: Ribera, Ignacio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Ochthebius  ( Ochthebius )  wurayah  Jäch & Delgado, 2010    Material examined.  Loc. 4: 3 ♁♁ 4 ♀♀ (1 ♁ used for DNA extraction, voucher number IBE-AN1103).   Notes.  New record for Oman. The species was so far only known from two localities in the UAE (JÄCH & DELGADO 2010).
